---
title: "Phase2"
author: Dev Gur
format: html
editor: visual
---

## 

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(haven)
library(janitor)

itw_2024 <- read_sav("data/ITW_2024.sav")
itw_2025 <- read_sav("data/ITW_2025.sav")

```

```{r}
itw_2024 <- itw_2024 %>%
  mutate(year = 2024)

itw_2025 <- itw_2025 %>%
  mutate(year = 2025)


itw_2025 <- itw_2025 %>%
  rename(K6score = k6score)

itw_all <- bind_rows(itw_2024, itw_2025)

```
```{r}
itw_all <- itw_all %>%
  mutate(
    Year = if_else(is.na(Year) & Wave == 4, 2025, Year)
  )

itw_all <- itw_all %>%
  mutate(
    quarter = paste(Year, paste0("Q", Wave))
  )
```



```{r}
nrow(itw_2024)
nrow(itw_2025)
nrow(itw_all)
```
```{r}
itw_all %>%
  count(Year, Wave)
```

```{r}
wave_summary <- itw_all %>%
  group_by(quarter) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_f10 = mean(f10_1, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_k6 = mean(K6score, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n()
  )
```
